text:
are used as a counter for the 
number of providers within that state and type of provider (i.e., this is a unique but not necessarily 
sequential number). 
SHORT NAME: PRVDRNUM 
LONG NAME: PRVDR_NUM 
TYPE: 
CHAR 
LENGTH: 
10 
SOURCE: 
NCH 
VALUES: 
The following are the last four digits of the provider number; the blocks of numbers classify the facilities: 
0001–0879 
Short-term (general and specialty) hospitals where Type of bill (TOB) = 11X; ESRD clinic 
where TOB = 72X 
0880–0899 
Reserved
